title: Deep Dark Nether Portal
description: Enables the player to travel to the Nether using the portal found in the Ancient City!
body:
Is the Ancient City...boring? I was so excited when the concept was first announced, but after I got the Swift Sneak enchantment for my leggings and all the echo shards I could carry for a soul compass, plus the pieces for a music disk that gave me the shivers, what was the point of going back? This mod intends to give a reason to keep going back to the Ancient City and brave its dangers. Now you can ignite the portal in the city center and use it to travel to the Nether!
![Nether Portal in the Ancient City portal frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z7I4xJWg/images/f2321e9c235868e1b416c8b604a98372a89e3e00.png)

Intended to be paired with a mod like [No Nether Portal](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-nether-portal) to disable standard nether portals.

Because other mods do it better, this mod does not disable standard obsidian portals on its own.

Craft an Echo Stone using four echo shards and an amethyst shard and use it to activate the ancient city portal and reach the Nether. The item is damaged by 1 when used (except in creative mode). If you are having trouble lighting the portal, be sure to check for Sculk Veins clinging to the Reinforced Deepslate that are getting in the way of generating the portal.
![Crafting recipe for the Ancient City portal frame ignition item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z7I4xJWg/images/38e49c2bd0b350adcf1574d6dfbb676800a9e304.png)

Once you reach the Nether, a portal will be generated for your return (just as it does when you use a standard obsidian portal). Difference being that you cannot move the portal because it is made of Reinforced Deepslate. One way in, one way out, unless you find another Ancient City and ignite its portal there (or if you don't disable standard obsidian nether portals).
![Nether portal made of Reinforced Deepslate on the Nether side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z7I4xJWg/images/516d6859585d0b88a7847a381515169a15bd510d.png)

Note that the v1.0 version of this mod uses a unique portal block, so any mod that disables nether portal teleportation (as opposed to only disabling the creation of nether portals) will not disable the portals of this mod.

Made with MCreator
